svg.title: CRM and contact center relationship
svg.desc: Split diagram showing CRM as the memory on the left and the contact center platform as the conversation engine on the right, connected by an API integration in the middle. Screen pop and vendor examples sit below each column.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a customer record in a CRM contain?')
sendPrompt('How does CRM store interaction history?')
sendPrompt('How does CRM track purchase history?')
sendPrompt('How does CRM handle open tickets?')
sendPrompt('How does CRM store account value and tier?')
sendPrompt('How does an IVR work in a contact center?')
sendPrompt('What does a contact center queue look like?')
sendPrompt('How does call recording work in a contact center?')
sendPrompt('What does the agent desktop look like?')
sendPrompt('How do CRM and contact center platforms integrate via API?')
sendPrompt('What is a screen pop and what does the agent see?')

svg.text: The CRM is the memory. The contact center is the conversation.
